tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
going out tonight, changes into something red[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
her mother doesn't like that kind of dress[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Everything she never had she's showing off[/tab]
[ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
driving too fast, moon is breaking through her hair[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
she's heading for something that she won't forget[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
having no regret is all that she really[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Wants[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
We're only getting older baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
And I've been thinking about it lately[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Does it ever drive you crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Just how fast the night changes[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Everything that you've ever dreamed of[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Disappearing when you wake up[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
But there's nothing to be afraid of[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Even when the night changes[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
it'll never change me and you[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Chasing here tonight, doubts around and round her head[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
he's waiting hides behind a cigarette[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
heart is beating loud but she doesn't want it stop[/tab]
[ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Moving to fast, moon is lighting up her skin[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
she's falling doesn't even know it yet[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
having no regrets is all she really wants[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
We're only getting older baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
And I've been thinking about it lately[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Does it ever drive you crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Just how fast the night changes[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Everything that you've ever dreamed of[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Disappearing when you wake up[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
But there's nothing to be afraid of[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Even when the night changes[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
it'll never change me and you[/tab]

[Last Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
It'll never change baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
it'll never change baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
It'll never change me and you[/tab]
[ch]G[/ch]
